name: send-sms
description: Send an SMS text message to a phone number. Provider handles carrier transport. Consumers specify recipient and message — Claude routes to the appropriate provider tool based on grants.

behavior.input: A recipient phone number (with country code), a message string, and optional hints dict
behavior.output: Confirmation of delivery with channel details and success/failure status
behavior.deterministic: Delivery must succeed or return explicit failure — never silently drop

source.description: Name of the plugin or system that generated the SMS
